title: fix: migrate nanobanana to gemini-2.5-flash-image GA endpoint
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Stable Bananas
gist.blurb: We've migrated our nanobanana image model to the stable Gemini 2.5 Flash endpoint. Smooth sailing and pixel-perfect generation ahead!
gist.summary: Migrated the nanobanana image generation model from the retiring preview endpoint to the stable Gemini 2.5 Flash GA endpoint.
gist.impact: Ensures continued reliability for nanobanana image generation without any interruption to service.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about 'nanobanana' (an image model) graduating from 'preview' to 'stable/GA'. The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot admiring a glowing, stable banana.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot admiring a perfectly glowing, stable pixel-art banana on a pedestal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The robot's screen shows a green checkmark. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot admiring a perfectly glowing, stable pixel-art banana on a pedestal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. The robot's screen shows a green checkmark. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
